name: Creepy Crawly Spider Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1 cup of chocolate chips in a heavy saucepan over low heat.
2. Mix in the cereal and the shredded coconut until well combined.
3. Drop teaspoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper to form the spiders' bodies.
4. Melt the second cup of chocolate chips.
5. Gently stir in the chow mein noodles.
6. When the chocolate is cooled, pick out one noodle at a time and attach them to the spider bodies as legs (8 per spider).
7. Add dots of frosting for eyes if desired.
8. Leftover chocolate noodles can be used to make more spider cookies.
